title: cryptogramma aurata
intro: Cryptogramma aurata, also known as the golden rockfoil, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family, typically found in shaded, moist areas of the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cryptogramma aurata include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
